# ShakiLabs UI artifact

`shakilabs-ui-0.2.3.tgz` is the active exact artifact for `@shakilabs/ui` 0.2.3.

- Source repository: `00.root-shakilabs`
- Source commit: `4bf4e07`
- SHA-256: `b3f1709b747ba70c8a490ae33b806f3be6767081343954d34a44496dc395f737`
- Rollback artifacts: `shakilabs-ui-0.2.2.tgz`, `shakilabs-ui-0.2.1.tgz`, `shakilabs-ui-0.1.0.tgz`

All artifacts are committed so an isolated Vercel checkout can run `npm ci` without a private registry token.
